---
title: GreyNoise
sidebar_position: 11
---

# GreyNoise

**Service Overview**

GreyNoise is a cyber intelligence and defense service designed to help organizations gain a better understanding of the Internet threat landscape and strengthen their security posture. Leveraging an extensive database of digital noise, GreyNoise identifies and differentiates harmless activities from genuine threats, enabling security teams to focus on real risks.

**Key Features**

1.  **Digital Noise Identification:** GreyNoise continuously collects and analyzes data from various Internet sources to determine IP addresses and known actors generating "digital noise." This digital noise includes mundane activities, vulnerability scans, and other non-malicious behaviors.

2.  **Known Threat Filtering:** By excluding IP addresses associated with digital noise activities, GreyNoise reduces the number of false positives in security alerts, allowing analysts to concentrate on potentially dangerous activities.

3.  **Integration with Security Tools:** GreyNoise seamlessly integrates with existing security tools such as Security Information and Event Management (SIEM) systems and threat intelligence platforms, enhancing threat detection and incident response times.

4.  **Data Visualization:** The GreyNoise service offers a user-friendly visual interface that allows security analysts to map and analyze digital noise trends over a given period, facilitating an understanding of behavioral patterns.

5.  **Integration API:** GreyNoise provides a robust API that enables businesses to automate queries to the GreyNoise database and integrate data into their own custom tools and systems.

**Key Benefits**

-   **Reduced False Positive Alerts:** By distinguishing harmless activities from real threats, GreyNoise allows security teams to focus on what truly matters, reducing time and effort spent on false or non-critical alerts.

-   **Improved Threat Detection:** By identifying known actors of digital noise, GreyNoise provides additional insights into malicious activities, enhancing the detection of new and emerging threats.

-   **Optimized Resource Allocation:** With a better understanding of threats, security teams can allocate resources effectively to better protect their organization.

GreyNoise is a vital tool for enterprises seeking to bolster their resilience against cyber threats and make informed decisions in cybersecurity.

## **Getting started with GreyNoise**

1.  Go to the `**MY API KEY**` page

![Image without caption](https://image-forwarder.notaku.)

2.  Click on `**VIEW API KEY**` button and copy the API key

![Image without caption](https://image-forwarder.notaku.)

3.  Go to the `**VAULT**` page and click on the `**CREATE A CREDENTIAL**` button.

![Image without caption](https://image-forwarder.notaku.)

4.  Search for Greynoise in the search bar and select GreyNoise (Vendor)

![Image without caption](https://image-forwarder.notaku.)

5.  Select `**HTTP API Key**` type

![Image without caption](https://image-forwarder.notaku.)

6.  `**Key**` field must contain key and `**Value**` field must contain API Key

![Image without caption](https://image-forwarder.notaku.)

7.  To create a flow, click on the `**+**` button and click on the chevron icon in the integration category.

![Image without caption](https://image-forwarder.notaku.)

8.  Search for Greynoise in the search bar, click on the first result and add the integration by clicking on the `**+**` icon.

![Image without caption](https://image-forwarder.notaku.)

9.  Return to your flow, click on the `**+**` and search for greynoise in the search bar. Then select an action

![Image without caption](https://image-forwarder.notaku.)

10.  Fill in the mandatory fields in the input section

![Image without caption](https://image-forwarder.notaku.)

11.  Select the desired server in the `**Server**` field

![Image without caption](https://image-forwarder.notaku.)

12.  Click on the flow run button at top left

![Image without caption](https://image-forwarder.notaku.)

13.  Congratulations on deploying your first flow with GreyNoise 🎉

![Image without caption](https://image-forwarder.notaku.)
